global.description: The ad features a vibrant blue background with a clear focus on cashback offers and a call to action.
global.main_message: Sign up for cashback rewards with VaultRun.

elements.label: Solid blue background
elements.description: A solid blue background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant and engaging backdrop.

elements.label: VaultRun logo
elements.description: The logo features the text 'VaultRun' in a bold, modern font, prominently displayed at the top center.

elements.label: UGC icon
elements.description: A small circular icon labeled 'UGC' is positioned at the top left, indicating user-generated content.

elements.label: Cashback offer headline
elements.description: The headline reads 'Earn cashback daily' in a large, eye-catching font, centered in the middle of the ad.
elements.text_content: Earn cashback daily Fast signup; instant card

elements.label: Price tag
elements.description: The price is displayed as '€19.99' in a bold font, located at the bottom center of the ad.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A prominent button labeled 'Start now' is positioned at the bottom center, encouraging immediate action.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, bright and modern, cashback offer, call to action
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the headline in the center, with the price and CTA at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: VaultRun, UGC, Earn cashback daily, Fast signup, instant card, €19.99, Start now
